title: CobbleDollars Notes
description: Cobbledollars Notes is an addon for the CobbleDollars mod, designed to expand the in-game economy in your Cobblemon world.
body:
# CobbleDollar Notes

**Based on [CobbleDollars Ticket](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbledollars-ticket/) - the original mod on Modrinth.**

## Overview / 概要

CobbleDollar Notes adds physical currency to CobbleDollars: **coins** (€10, €100) and **notes** (€1,000, €10,000, €100,000, €1,000,000) you can trade or use at slot machines. With CobbleDollars installed you can exchange balance at the CobbleDollar Shop Villager once configured and pay for spins with notes or balance. Buy Golden, Silver, and Bronze Wealth Trophies to show off. Slot odds are configurable via JSON.

![Shows a preview of all the items in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7feb36743085bb9486599b588ac58fb2dfb6072.png)

---

## Features / 主な機能

**Pokézon** 🛒 - Right-click to open the CobbleDollar Shop from anywhere (once configured).

**Physical currency** 💵 - Coins: €10, €100. Notes: €1,000, €10,000, €100,000, €1,000,000. Right-click to add to balance; Sneak + Right-click to redeem a full stack. To get notes/coins from your balance, configure the CobbleDollar Shop (see below).

**Slot machines** 🎰 - Normal: €1,000/play, jackpot €120,000. Premium: €10,000/play, jackpot €1,500,000. Pay with notes or balance. Level system and configurable odds in `config/CobbleDollarNotes/config.json`.

**Wealth trophies** 🏆 - Gold €100,000,000, Silver €10,000,000, Bronze €1,000,000. Shop purchase needs CobbleDollars + Shop config.

**Advancements** - For slots, trophies, jackpot, and Pokézon.

---

## How to use / 使い方

- **Pokézon** - Hold it, Right-click to open the CobbleDollar Shop.
- **Notes/coins** - Right-click to add one to your balance; Sneak + Right-click to redeem the whole stack.
- **Slots** - Use a machine, put €1,000 or €10,000 notes in inventory (or have enough balance), and press **SPIN REELS!**.
- **Trophies** - Buy from the Shop (if configured) or obtain in-game; place the block to display.

---

## Dependencies / 依存MOD

**Required:** CobbleDollars (balance, redemption, shop). With CobbleDollars, slots accept notes or balance; redemption and getting notes/coins from the shop need CobbleDollars + shop config.

---

## Configuration Guide / 設定ガイド

**Slot odds** - `config/CobbleDollarNotes/config.json`. Auto-created on first run. Two arrays: `normalProbabilities` and `premiumProbabilities`, each 4 levels × 4 outcomes (Jackpot, Big Win, Small Win, Cherry Match; order [0]-[3], values 0-1, remainder = Miss).

**CobbleDollar Shop** - Players get notes/coins from their balance via the CobbleDollar Shop (villager). In `config/cobbledollars/default_shop.json`, add sections for Tickets, Coins, and Trophies so the shop sells them. Merge with existing JSON as needed.

Example **default_shop.json** sections (Tickets, Coins, Trophies):

```json
{ "Tickets": [
  { "item": "cobbledollars_ticket:1000cobbledollar", "price": 1000 },
  { "item": "cobbledollars_ticket:10000cobbledollar", "price": 10000 },
  { "item": "cobbledollars_ticket:100000cobbledollar", "price": 100000 },
  { "item": "cobbledollars_ticket:1000000cobbledollar", "price": 1000000 }
]},
{ "Coins": [
  { "item": "cobbledollars_ticket:10cobbledollar", "price": 10 },
  { "item": "cobbledollars_ticket:100cobbledollar", "price": 100 }
]},
{ "Trophies": [
  { "item": "cobbledollars_ticket:gold_trophy", "price": 100000000 },
  { "item": "cobbledollars_ticket:silver_trophy", "price": 10000000 },
  { "item": "cobbledollars_ticket:bronze_trophy", "price": 1000000 }
]}
```
